title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock with Cooldown

content.problemStatement:
We are given an array Arr[] of length n. It represents the price of a stock on ‘n’ days. The following guidelines need to be followed:




We can buy and sell the stock any number of times.In order to sell the stock, we need to first buy it on the same or any previous day.We can’t buy a stock again after buying it once. In other words, we first buy a stock and then sell it. After selling we can buy and sell again. But we can’t sell before buying and can’t buy before selling any previously bought stock.We can’t buy a stock on the very next day of selling it. This is the <st
content.inputFormat: An array of integers representing the stock prices for each day

solution.approach: Use dynamic programming to track the maximum profit at each day, considering whether we can buy or sell the stock
